case_title: TSANG, NATALIE KIT YEE vs. SIRI, RITA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, NATALIE KIT YEE AS TO DEFENDANT SIRI, RITA SIRI, RUDOLPH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-02-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-03-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-14-1997
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-02-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE FOR POS ON DEFTS. HEARING SET FOR JUN-11-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-11-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-11-1997, TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. TO FILE POS OR ORDER TO SERVE BY PUBLICATION. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-26-1997 CONTINUED FROM JUN-11-1997 TO JUL-30-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-30-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-30-1997, TO FILE POS OR PROOF OF PUBLICATION. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER NATALIE KIT YEE TSANG., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-14-1997 CONTINUED FROM JUL-30-1997 TO SEP-10-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-10-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER. PLTF IN PRO PER TO FILE A STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-25-1997 CONTINUED FROM SEP-10-1997 TO OCT-22-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, NATALIE KIT YEE

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-22-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-22-1997, TO FILE POS. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE A NEW STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-06-1997 CONTINUED FROM OCT-22-1997 TO DEC-10-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, NATALIE KIT YEE

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-10-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL BASED ON SETTLEMENT. HEARING SET FOR MAR-11-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-11-1998, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF TSANG, NATALIE KIT YEE
AMENDED DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
